summary: All P0 bug fixes VERIFIED. Backend API tests (13/13 passed) confirm: Stats/leaderboard player count consistency (34 match), Telegram TG_/tg_ case-tolerant lookup works, API performance <2s. Frontend smoke tests passed: Leaderboard shows 34 active players with rows and Season 1 badge, GameLab desktop loads with character selection UI.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Leaderboard and GameLab desktop smoke tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 fixes verified: (1) /api/stats total_players=34 matches /api/leaderboard entries=34, (2) Telegram profile lookup works with both tg_ and TG_ prefixes (case-tolerant), (3) All API performance <2s (leaderboard: 0.46s, stats: 0.29s, chat: 0.18s), (4) Happy hour shows bonus_percent=25, (5) Leaderboard UI shows 34 Active Players card with rows and VIP badges

p0_telegram_case_tolerance.details: Both tg_7438800063 and TG_7438800063 return same profile data (telegram_id: 7438800063)

p0_leaderboard_performance.details: Leaderboard API: 0.46s, Stats API: 0.29s, Chat API: 0.18s - all under 2s requirement

frontend_leaderboard_rendering.details: Leaderboard shows 34 rows, Active Players card displays 34, Season 1 badge, countdown, VIP badges visible
